data.name: 妖狐的戀愛學程
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


關於此遊戲

【故事】

偉大的九尾妖狐以九條尾巴，創造出九個分靈體，傳說妖狐的分靈體能實現人的願望。透過實現人類的願望獲得『代價』，進而榮耀妖狐的本體使其力量增強。
其中一個妖狐的分靈體來到東方的國家，在魅惑了許多人後，遭到當地的陰陽師識破。
但妖狐是殺不死的，只能將其封印，過了近千年的歲月，如今封印妖狐的殺生石破裂了……
正當你百無聊賴看著電視節目時，電鈴突然響起，開門發現一位銀髮樣貌可愛的OL，「請問你有想實現的願望嗎？」
還未回過神來就與她簽定了「契約」，傳說中的妖狐找上了你並許下承諾，只要你能好好完成她的課程，她就會實現你提出的「願望」。
努力完成課程並滿足妖狐的慾望吧！與美麗的大妖狐沒羞沒臊的暑假生活就要開始！

【角色】


稻荷 空:
遜炮萌，容易得意忘形，但本性並不邪惡甚至偏向善良。
相對矜持，時不時會被男主角可怕的性癖嚇到。
是傳說中的大妖狐「九尾妖狐」分裂出來的一尾，因為各種原因漂泊至日本。
靠從人類身上獲得「精氣」維持生計，與人類訂下契約並為其實現願望，契約者則需要提供精氣供養妖狐，但不需要愛愛，因此還是處女（老處狐）。
從殺生石逃脫之後找上主角，與主角簽訂契約後同居於主角家中。

【遊戲系統】

在遊戲中，不同的課程將由各具特色的小遊戲呈現，玩家在遊戲中每天可以選擇一項小遊戲遊玩，並需要在特定日數(結算日)通關一定量的課程，確保妖狐的精氣來源。
如果無法達到妖狐的標準，沒有人知道會發生什麼事…

【遊戲特色】

  • 女主角全程配音
  • 故事全動態立繪
  • 9種可替換服裝，互動式動態立繪
  • 5種動態性愛姿勢隨進度解鎖
  • 超過20張CG
  • 超過25000字精美文本

  • 5種動態性愛姿勢隨進度解鎖
  • 超過20張CG
  • 超過25000字精美文本
data.short_description: 被封印千年的妖狐突然逃脫了「殺生石」的封印回到了現世， 在你回過神來前，便成為了她的「契約者」，受妖狐之力影響，你獸性大發推倒了妖狐… 開始與妖狐的同居生活，完成臉紅心跳的課堂， 用「精氣」填滿她！甜蜜又黏膩的戀愛喜劇，屬於你與妖狐老師的故事！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 繁體中文, 日文*, 韓文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Kon's Lesson!
data.detailed_description:
💟Add in WishList!!💟


About the Game

【Story】


According to legend, the Nine-tail Fox Spirit split all her tails into nine separate spirits. These spirits can fulfill human wishes, but for the wish to come true, "offerings" need to be made.
Among many of the split spirits, one particular spirit made her way to a nation in the far east. After seducing many people, she was eventually exposed by the Onmyoji; they punished the immortal being by sealing her under a stone. Now, after a thousand years, the seal was beginning to show its cracks…
You were just watching TV on your sofa when the doorbell rings. You open the door to see an adorable silver-haired lady. “Do you have a wish to fulfill?” she asks. Before you know it you have signed a pact with her, the legendary fox spirit now promises to fulfill your wish, as long as you complete her lessons.
Try your best to complete the lessons and satisfy the fox spirit’s desire! Get ready for a steamy summer vacation with this beautiful fox lady!

【Character】



Inari Kon:
Kon puts up a prideful appearance to mask her naïve and clumsy nature. She lacks any sexual knowledge so she’s often stunned by your… unique kinks.
After splitting from the Nine-Tailed Fox Spirit, she drifted here and there before arriving in Japan.
Kon feeds on human”energy”. She does so by signing pacts with humans, fulfilling their wishes, and taking their “energy” in return. Sexual intercourse is not a requirement for energy transmission so she has remained a virgin.
After breaking out from under the “Killing Stone”, Kon appears before you, ready to sign a pact. What’s your next move?

【System】


Experience Kon’s lessons through mini-games! You gain points for each lesson you complete. If you don’t reach your goal by the end of the week… Who knows what Kon will do to you?


【Key features】

  • Fully-voiced Heroine
  • Interactive & animated portraits of the heroine throughout the story
  • Nine swappable costumes
  • Five unlockable animated sex poses
  • Over 20 collectable CGs

data.short_description: She was sealed for a thousand years… but now she’s living with you! Fulfill your contract with her by completing her lessons and feeding her “energy” in this cute ‘n steamy romantic comedy game!
data.supported_languages:
English, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*, Korean, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
